zh.Chadwell in Barking, Essex, England: 英國艾可查阿德維爾 在 巴爾金
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Edgerton De Malpas於1333年出生在英國斯塔福爾可利時，他的父親Urian Egerton26歲，母親Amelia De Warburton9歲。他於1375年之前與Margaret Blackenhall在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1391年在他的家鄉享年58歲。

zh-hans.Chadwell in Barking, Essex, England: 英国艾可查阿德維爾 在 巴爾金
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Edgerton De Malpas于1333年出生在英国斯塔福爾可利时，他的父亲Urian Egerton26岁，母亲Amelia De Warburton9岁。他于1375年之前与Margaret Blackenhall在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1391年在他的家乡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Malpas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Malpass
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Gloucestershire): habitational name, chiefly from either of two places called Malpas (Cheshire, England and Monmouthshire, Wales); perhaps also occasionally from other minor places so called in England (e.g. in Berkshire, Cornwall, and Yorkshire) or from various places called Malpas or Maupas in France. The placenames derive from Old French mal ‘bad’ + pas ‘passage’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

nameMeanings.name: Edgerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Egerton in Cheshire and Kent, Egerton in Wheathill (Shropshire), Egerton in Bolton le Moors (Lancashire), Egerton in Scammonden (Yorkshire), or Edgerton in Huddersfield (Yorkshire). Egerton in Kent is from the Old English personal name Ecgheard + Old English tūn ‘estate, farmstead’ (see Eckert ), but Egerton in Chesire is more likely to derive from the Old English personal name Ecghere (in which the second element is Old English here ‘army’) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Egerton
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a local name from any of various places in Bedfordshire, Merseyside, and Nottinghamshire, so named from Old English eorfor ‘wild boar’ + tūn ‘settlement’. Sometimes the name may be bestowed in honour of Everton Football Club.

variants.name: Eckert
meanings: German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements agi ‘point, edge (of a sword)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. Compare Ackert and Eckerd .

variants.name: Agerton
meanings: Possibly an altered form of English   Edgerton  .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Edgerton De Malpas was born in 1333, in Checkley, Staffordshire, England, his father, Urian Egerton, was 26 and his mother, Amelia De Warburton, was 9. He married Margaret Blackenhall before 1375, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1391, in his hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Edgerton De Malpas est né en 1333, à Checkley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Urian Egerton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Amelia De Warburton, avait 9 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Blackenhall avant 1375, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1391, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Edgerton De Malpas 1333 in Checkley, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Urian Egerton 26 und seine Mutter Amelia De Warburton 9. Er hat vor 1375 in Staffordshire, England Margaret Blackenhall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1391 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Edgerton De Malpas è nato il nel 1333 nel Checkley, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Urian Egerton, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Amelia De Warburton, aveva 9 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Blackenhall prima del 1375, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1391, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Edgerton De Malpasが1333年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアチェックリーで生まれた時，父Urian Egertonは26歳，母Amelia De Warburtonは9歳であった。1375年以前にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでMargaret Blackenhallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1391年に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Edgerton De Malpas(이)가 1333년 영국 스태퍼드실르 체클리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Urian Egerton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Amelia De Warburton(은)는 9세였다. 그는 1375년 이전 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Margaret Blackenhall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1391년 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Edgerton De Malpas nasceu em 1333, em Checkley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Urian Egerton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Amelia De Warburton, tinha 9 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Blackenhall antes 1375, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1391, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Edgerton De Malpas родился в 1333 г. в местности чеккли, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Urian Egerton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Amelia De Warburton, 9. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Blackenhall перед 1375 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1391 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Edgerton De Malpas nació en 1333, en Checkley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Urian Egerton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Amelia De Warburton, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Margaret Blackenhall antes de 1375, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1391, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años.
